title: Maximal Sobolev regularity of the stress tensor for the symmetric gradient p-Laplace system
summary: The symmetric $p$-Laplace operator enters various models in mathematical physics, such as incompressible materials with power-type hardening and non-Newtonian fluids. In this work, second-order differentiability properties of solutions to the symmetric $p$-Laplace system are established. They are formulated as maximal Sobolev regularity of the nonlinear stress tensor for locally square integrable right-hand sides.

AI.tldr: 建立了对称p-Laplace系统解的二阶可微性性质，表现为非线性应力张量在局部平方可积右端项下的最大Sobolev正则性。
AI.motivation: 对称p-Laplace算子出现在各种数学物理模型中，如具有幂型硬化的不可压缩材料和非牛顿流体，研究其解的正则性对理解这些物理现象至关重要。
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev空间理论、非线性椭圆系统的正则性分析、最大正则性方法，以及处理对称p-Laplace算子的特殊非线性结构。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了对称p-Laplace系统解的二阶可微性性质，具体表现为：对于局部平方可积的右端项，非线性应力张量具有最大Sobolev正则性。
AI.significance: 为对称p-Laplace系统的正则性理论提供了重要进展，对理解相关物理模型的数学性质有重要意义，为后续数值分析和应用研究提供了理论基础。

title: Periodic Homogenization of Local/Nonlocal Systems
summary:
In this paper, we study the homogenization of elliptic equations that combine a local part, given by the Laplacian with Neumann boundary conditions, and its nonlocal version, defined through an integral operator with a smooth kernel. These two components are coupled through an additional nonlocal operator also given by a smooth kernel. We consider a sequence of partitions of a fixed spatial domain into two regions - local and nonlocal - which are periodically distributed in space (with one of the regions consisting of small, periodically arranged holes).
  Depending on the relative location of the local and nonlocal regions, we obtain qualitatively different limit behaviors. When the local part of the equation is confined to the small periodic holes, the sequence of solutions converges to the unique solution of a limit system in which the local component vanishes, while the nonlocal part persists and splits into two distinct components. On the other hand, when the local part of the problem lies outside the holes, the limit system exhibits a homogenized local diffusion operator coupled with a nonlocal equation. Finally, we analyze an intermediate regime in which only part of the local diffusion survives in the limit, by considering configurations consisting of parallel thin strips instead of holes.

AI.tldr: 研究了局部（拉普拉斯算子）与非局部（积分算子）耦合椭圆方程在周期性区域划分下的均匀化极限行为
AI.motivation: 研究局部与非局部算子耦合的椭圆方程在周期性区域划分下的均匀化问题，探索不同区域配置对极限行为的影响
AI.techniques: 均匀化理论、周期性结构分析、变分方法、非局部算子理论、渐近展开
AI.main_theorems: 三种不同的极限行为：1）局部部分在小孔中时，极限系统只有非局部部分；2）局部部分在孔外时，极限系统包含均匀化局部扩散算子与非局部方程耦合；3）中间情形（平行细条带）下部分局部扩散在极限中保留
AI.significance: 为局部与非局部耦合系统的均匀化理论提供了系统分析框架，揭示了区域几何配置对极限行为的决定性影响，对复合材料和多尺度建模有重要应用价值

title: Asymptotic linear stability of columnar vortices driven by Coriolis force
summary: In this paper, we establish the asymptotic linear stability of a class of Coriolis-driven columnar vortices for the 3-D axisymmetric Euler equations. This result represents a critical step toward proving the nonlinear asymptotic stability of such vortices. The key and widely applicable strategy is to construct a distorted Fourier basis, which is achieved by solving a two-parameter $(c, ξ)$-dependent Schrödinger equation associated with the linearized operator of the system. To capture the precise asymptotic behavior of the solution, we decompose the $c-ξ$ plane into distinct regions, with the partitioning guided by the leading-order profiles of the Schrödinger equation across different parameter regimes.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维轴对称Euler方程中一类科里奥利力驱动的柱状涡旋的渐近线性稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究三维轴对称Euler方程中科里奥利力驱动的柱状涡旋的稳定性问题，这是证明此类涡旋非线性渐近稳定性的关键步骤
AI.techniques: 构造扭曲傅里叶基，通过求解与线性化算子相关的含双参数(c,ξ)的薛定谔方程，并将c-ξ平面分解为不同区域进行分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了科里奥利力驱动的柱状涡旋的渐近线性稳定性结果
AI.significance: 为证明此类涡旋的非线性渐近稳定性奠定了基础，所发展的扭曲傅里叶基方法具有广泛适用性，对流体力学稳定性理论有重要贡献

title: Mean first escape times of Brownian motion on asymptotically hyperbolic and gas giant metric surfaces
summary: This paper deals with the mean first escape time of Brownian motion on asymptotically hyperbolic and gas giant surfaces. We show that for a boundary defining function $ρ$, the mean first escape time $u_ε(x)$ from the truncated Riemannian surface with an asymptotically hyperbolic metric $(M_ε,\bar{g}/ρ^2) = (\{x\in M:ρ(x)\geq ε\},\bar{g}/ρ^2) \subset (M,\bar{g}/ρ^2)$ satisfies the asymptotic expansion $u_ε(x) = -\log ε+ \mathcal{O}(1)$ as $ε\to 0 $. Furthermore, we show that in the case of a gas giant metric $g = \bar{g}/ρ^α$, where $α\in (0,2)$, the mean first escape time from the surface $(M_ε,\bar{g}/ρ^α)$ satisfies $u_ε(x) = \mathcal{O}(1)$ as $ε\to 0 $. Using techniques from the theory of polyhomogeneous conormal functions we explain this difference between in the mean first escape time on gas giant metric surfaces and asymptotically hyperbolic surfaces on the unit disc. Finally, we confirm these results using Monte Carlo simulations and finite difference methods on the disc.

AI.tldr: 证明了渐近双曲曲面和气体巨星曲面上布朗运动平均首次逃逸时间的渐近行为差异
AI.motivation: 研究布朗运动在不同几何结构（渐近双曲曲面和气体巨星曲面）上的逃逸行为差异，理解几何度量对随机过程动力学的影响
AI.techniques: 使用多齐次共法函数理论、蒙特卡洛模拟和有限差分方法，分析边界定义函数和度量结构
AI.main_theorems: 渐近双曲曲面上平均首次逃逸时间满足u_ε(x) = -log ε + O(1)，而气体巨星度量下满足u_ε(x) = O(1)
AI.significance: 揭示了不同几何结构对随机过程逃逸行为的本质影响，为随机微分方程在非欧几何中的应用提供理论基础

title: Reformulation and Interpretation of the Regularity Criterion for 3D NSE Based on Finitely Many Observations
summary: We revisit and sharpen a recent observable regularity criterion for the three-dimensional Navier-Stokes equations on the periodic cube by requiring only finitely many measurements of the flow on a given time interval. Two data models are treated: (i) modal observations (a finite set of low Fourier modes), and (ii) nodal observations, i.e. values of the velocity field sampled at finitely many points on a uniform grid. The key upgrade is a piecewise linear interpolant built on a fixed five-tetrahedra subdivision of each grid cube, which removes the mollification step used previously and yields an explicit control of the derivatives of the interpolation operator purely in terms of the measured data. The criterion is also shown to be both necessary and sufficient for regularity.

AI.tldr: 提出了三维Navier-Stokes方程基于有限测量数据的可观测正则性判据，通过五面体细分网格的逐片线性插值改进先前结果
AI.motivation: 研究三维Navier-Stokes方程的正则性问题是流体力学核心难题，本文旨在建立基于有限测量数据的可观测正则性判据，仅需给定时间区间上的有限次测量即可判断解的全局正则性
AI.techniques: 采用两种数据模型：模态观测（有限低频傅里叶模式）和节点观测（均匀网格点上的速度场采样）；关键创新是构建基于固定五面体细分的逐片线性插值算子，避免了先前的磨光步骤
AI.main_theorems: 建立了基于有限测量的可观测正则性判据，证明了该判据对于正则性既是必要的也是充分的；通过显式控制插值算子的导数，仅用测量数据即可判断解的全局正则性
AI.significance: 改进了先前结果，提供了更实用的正则性判据，为基于有限实验或数值数据的Navier-Stokes方程正则性分析提供了理论框架，在计算流体力学和实验流体力学中有应用价值

title: Stochastic Compressible Euler Equations with Frictional Damping: Existence of $L^\infty$ Martingale Solutions and Asymptotic Porous Medium-Like Behavior
summary:
We study the one-dimensional isentropic compressible Euler equations with linear (frictional) damping, subject to multiplicative, white-in-time stochastic forcing. The system is posed on a bounded interval with $L^\infty$ initial data and Dirichlet boundary conditions imposed on the momentum. We establish the global-in-time existence of $L^\infty$ martingale solutions that satisfy an appropriate entropy inequality. Then, we analyze the long-time behavior of these solutions and show that, under suitable assumptions on the noise, they converge almost surely and exponentially fast to a constant steady state of the system. The limiting density is well-approximated by the asymptotic solution of the deterministic porous medium equation, while the momentum exhibits the asymptotic behavior predicted by Darcy's law.
  The analysis in the stochastic setting is delicate, as temporal white-noise perturbations can significantly influence the long-time statistics of the solution. Our approach hinges on deriving sharp moment estimates for the entropy, which enable us to quantify and ultimately prove the decay of stochastic effects. To the best of our knowledge, this work provides the first rigorous pathwise convergence result for the long-time behavior of solutions to the stochastic isentropic compressible Euler equations with linear damping.

AI.tldr: 建立了带线性阻尼和乘性白噪声随机扰动的可压缩Euler方程全局L∞鞅解的存在性，并证明了其几乎必然指数收敛到常数稳态
AI.motivation: 研究带线性阻尼和随机扰动的可压缩Euler方程，这类方程在流体力学和随机偏微分方程中有重要应用，但随机扰动对长时间行为的影响尚未被严格分析
AI.techniques: 使用鞅解理论、熵不等式方法、尖锐矩估计、随机分析技术，结合确定性多孔介质方程和达西定律的渐近分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 全局L∞鞅解的存在性；2. 满足熵不等式的解的存在性；3. 在适当噪声假设下，解几乎必然指数收敛到常数稳态；4. 密度渐近行为由多孔介质方程描述，动量满足达西定律
AI.significance: 首次为带线性阻尼的随机等熵可压缩Euler方程提供了严格的路径收敛结果，建立了随机扰动下解的长时间行为理论，连接了确定性多孔介质方程和随机流体力学

title: Lower bounds on the blowup rate of vorticity in the Euler equations
summary: Under the assumption that a solution to the 3D incompressible Euler equations blows up at a time $T_\ast$ and that $T_\ast $ is the first such time, we establish lower bounds on the rate of blow-up of the maximum norm of the vorticity. In particular, when the domain is $\mathbb{R}^3$ or $\mathbb{T}^3$, we provide lower bounds on the accumulation of $\|ω\|_{L^\infty}$ up to time $t$ and the supremum over $[0,t]$ of $\|ω\|_{L^\infty}$ for $t$ sufficiently close to~$T_\ast$. Notably, this gives a quantitative description of the BKM blow-up criterion. Moreover, we provide lower bounds on the supremum over $[0,t]$ of $\|D^k ω\|_{L^\infty}$. When the domain is $\mathbb{T}^3$, we establish pointwise-in-time lower bounds on $\|D^kω\|_{L^\infty}$ for $t$ sufficiently close to~$T_\ast$.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维不可压缩欧拉方程在有限时间爆破时涡度最大模增长速率的下界估计
AI.motivation: 研究三维不可压缩欧拉方程在有限时间爆破时的定量性质，特别是涡度最大模的增长速率，为BKM爆破准则提供定量描述
AI.techniques: 利用爆破时间假设和爆破准则分析，建立涡度及其高阶导数最大模的下界估计，包括时间积分和上确界两种形式
AI.main_theorems: 在R³或T³上，当解在T*时刻首次爆破时，给出了‖ω‖_{L^∞}的累积积分和上确界的下界估计，以及高阶导数‖D^kω‖_{L^∞}的下界估计
AI.significance: 为三维欧拉方程爆破理论提供了定量刻画，深化了对BKM准则的理解，为研究流体奇点形成机制提供了新的数学工具

title: Singularly Perturbed Gradient Flows and Evolution of Critical Points in Infinite Dimensions
summary:
We consider singularly perturbed gradient flows in Hilbert spaces, driven by a time-dependent, nonconvex, and nonsmooth energy, and address the convergence of their solutions to curves of critical points of the driving energy functional. The degenerating nature of the estimates along the gradient-flow curves calls for novel compactness arguments, which we carefully develop by combining tools from the variational approach to Hilbert and metric gradient flows \cite{RossiSavare06,AGS08}, with fine requirements on the set of critical points of the energy.
  This leads us to prove that subsequential limits of singularly perturbed gradient flows are Dissipative Viscosity solutions of the limiting problem, i.e., a curves of critical points satisfying a suitable balance between the energy and a defect measure, encoding dissipation. This energy-dissipation balance encompasses information on the dynamics of the process at jump times, recording, in particular, the re-emergence of viscous behavior.
  Under a suitable rectifiability condition on the critical set, we show that Dissipative Viscosity solutions improve to Balanced Viscosity solutions, which have the key property that the dissipation measure is purely atomic.
  In the second part of the paper we show that, for smooth energies whose second differential is a Fredholm operator, the condition that the kernel of the Hessian has dimension at most one at every critical point already implies our measure-theoretic assumptions. We further relate them to the transversality conditions from bifurcation theory and show that they have a generic character.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了希尔伯特空间中奇异摄动梯度流的收敛性，证明了其解收敛到驱动能量泛函的临界点曲线，并建立了耗散粘性解与平衡粘性解的理论框架。
AI.motivation: 研究希尔伯特空间中由时间依赖、非凸、非光滑能量驱动的奇异摄动梯度流的收敛问题，旨在理解当摄动参数趋于零时，梯度流解如何收敛到驱动能量泛函的临界点曲线，并刻画跳跃时刻的动态行为。
AI.techniques: 结合希尔伯特和度量梯度流的变分方法，发展新的紧性论证；使用耗散粘性解和平衡粘性解的概念；引入临界点集的测度理论条件；利用Fredholm算子和Hessian核维数分析；联系分岔理论中的横截性条件。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 奇异摄动梯度流的子序列极限是极限问题的耗散粘性解，满足能量与耗散缺陷测度之间的平衡关系；2) 在临界点集满足适当可求长条件下，耗散粘性解提升为平衡粘性解，其耗散测度是纯原子的；3) 对于光滑能量，若Hessian核维数至多为1，则满足测度理论假设，且与分岔理论的横截性条件相关。
AI.significance: 建立了奇异摄动梯度流收敛的严格数学理论，为理解非凸优化、相变动力学等物理过程中的粘性行为提供了新框架；将变分方法、测度理论与分岔理论结合，发展了处理梯度流跳跃动态的新工具；证明了相关条件的泛型性质，增强了理论的普适性。

title: Kinetic Sobolev Spaces
summary: We define and study homogeneous kinetic Sobolev spaces adapted to the Kolmogorov equation. We consider both local and non-local diffusion. The spaces are built from the Lebesgue spaces L p for all integrability exponents p $\in$ (1, $\infty$) with regularity assumptions in the transport and diffusive directions according to the scaling of the Kolmogorov equation. The regularity scale accommodates weak and strong solutions. We prove that the proposed spaces satisfy sharp embeddings quantifying the transfer-ofregularity {à} la Bouchut-H{ö}rmander, continuity-in-time in the spirit of Lions and the gainof-integrability of Sobolev and Hardy-Littlewood-Sobolev type. A core tool are mapping properties of the Kolmogorov operator, given by the fundamental solution, established between anisotropic homogeneous Sobolev spaces. To achieve this, we prove L^p boundedness of related singular integral operators, for which we deduce novel kernel estimates by a Littlewood-Paley decomposition and geometric considerations. Moreover, we provide a new uniqueness criterion which allows us to show well-posedness of the Cauchy problem.

AI.tldr: 定义了适应Kolmogorov方程的同质动能Sobolev空间，建立了该空间的嵌入定理、时间连续性、积分提升性质，并证明了Cauchy问题的适定性。
AI.motivation: 研究Kolmogorov方程（包含局部和非局部扩散）的解析理论，需要建立适应其尺度结构的函数空间理论，以统一处理弱解和强解，并量化正则性转移现象。
AI.techniques: 使用各向异性齐次Sobolev空间、Littlewood-Paley分解、几何分析建立奇异积分算子的L^p有界性，利用基本解研究Kolmogorov算子的映射性质。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 定义了适应Kolmogorov尺度的动能Sobolev空间；2) 证明了Bouchut-Hörmander型正则性转移的尖锐嵌入；3) 建立了Lions型时间连续性；4) 获得了Sobolev和Hardy-Littlewood-Sobolev型积分提升；5) 给出了新的唯一性准则和Cauchy问题适定性。
AI.significance: 为Kolmogorov方程提供了系统的函数空间框架，统一了弱解和强解理论，建立了正则性转移的量化描述，为相关偏微分方程研究提供了新的分析工具。

title: On global dynamics for damped driven Jaynes-Cummings equations
summary:
The article concerns damped driven Jaynes-Cummings equation which describes quantised one-mode Maxwell field coupled to a two-level molecule. We consider a broad class of damping and pumping which are polynomial in the creation and annihilation operators, and their structures correspond to the theory of completely positive and trace preserving generators (CPTP) of Lindblad and Kossakowski & al.
  Our main result is the construction of global generalised solutions with values in the Hilbert space of nonnegative Hermitian Hilbert-Schmidt operators in the case of time-dependent pumping. The proofs rely on finite-dimensional approximations of the annihilation and creation operators.

AI.tldr: 构造了含时泵浦驱动的阻尼Jaynes-Cummings方程在希尔伯特-施密特算子空间中的全局广义解
AI.motivation: 研究量子光学中描述单模Maxwell场与两能级分子耦合的Jaynes-Cummings方程，考虑包含Lindblad和Kossakowski理论的完全正定保迹生成元（CPTP）的广泛阻尼和泵浦类
AI.techniques: 使用湮灭和产生算子的有限维逼近方法，在希尔伯特-施密特算子空间中构造广义解
AI.main_theorems: 在含时泵浦情况下，构造了在非负Hermitian希尔伯特-施密特算子希尔伯特空间中的全局广义解
AI.significance: 为量子光学中开放量子系统的动力学提供了严格的数学基础，扩展了CPTP生成元理论的应用，对量子信息处理和量子计算有重要意义

title: The relaxation limit of a homogeneous two-phase flow model: isothermal case
summary: This paper investigates the asymptotic behavior of a hyperbolic relaxation system designed for homogeneous two-phase flows in the limit of vanishing relaxation time. The governing equations comprise conservation laws for mixture mass and momentum, supplemented by a transport equation for the gas phase mass that includes a stiff relaxation source term. This source term drives the system toward local thermodynamic equilibrium. Under the assumptions of constant liquid density and an ideal isothermal gas phase, we demonstrate that, as the relaxation parameter \(ε\rightarrow 0\), a subsequence of solutions \((p^ε,u^ε)\) converges strongly in \(L_{\mathrm{loc}}^{1}\) to an entropy solution of the equilibrium Euler system. The proof integrates several analytical techniques: the construction of a suitable entropy pair and associated energy estimates, a transport equation approach for representing the error, commutator estimates, and the theory of compensated compactness. This work provides a rigorous justification of the relaxation limit for the homogeneous two-phase flows model.

AI.tldr: 证明了双相流双曲松弛系统在松弛参数趋于零时，其解序列强收敛于平衡欧拉系统的熵解
AI.motivation: 研究均匀两相流双曲松弛系统在松弛时间趋于零时的渐近行为，为松弛极限提供严格的数学证明
AI.techniques: 构建合适的熵对和能量估计、输运方程误差表示、交换子估计、补偿紧致性理论
AI.main_theorems: 当松弛参数ε→0时，解序列(p^ε,u^ε)在L_loc^1中强收敛于平衡欧拉系统的熵解
AI.significance: 为两相流松弛模型提供了严格的数学基础，验证了松弛极限的合理性，对双曲松弛系统的理论研究有重要意义

title: An optimal control approach to nonlinear wave speed selection in reaction-diffusion equations
summary: Travelling wave solutions of reaction-diffusion equations are widely used to model the spatial spread of populations and other phenomena in biology and physics. In this article, we reinterpret the classical variational principle approach through an optimal control formulation, in order to obtain a lower bound on the invasion speed of travelling wave solutions in systems of nonlinear partial differential equations. We begin by analysing single-species models, where the evolution of the density is governed by a scalar equation with a density-dependent diffusion term and a nonlinear reaction term. We show that for any admissible test function, maximising with respect to the parameter of interest yields a bound on the travelling wave speed. We apply this framework to several examples, including the porous-Fisher equation, and examine when nonlinear selection mechanisms dominate over the classical linear marginal stability criterion. Extending this approach, we then consider multi-species systems of reaction-diffusion equations and, reframed as Pontryagin-type optimality systems, we derive analogous bounds on the travelling wave speed using a variational framework under weak coupling. Finally, we employ numerical simulations to confirm the accuracy of the predicted wave speeds across a range of illustrative examples.

AI.tldr: 通过最优控制重新诠释变分原理，为反应扩散方程的传播波速提供下界估计
AI.motivation: 反应扩散方程的行波解广泛用于模拟生物和物理中的空间传播现象，传统变分方法需要重新诠释以获得更有效的波速估计
AI.techniques: 最优控制理论、Pontryagin型最优性系统、变分框架、弱耦合分析、数值模拟验证
AI.main_theorems: 建立了单物种和多物种反应扩散系统行波速度的下界估计方法，证明了非线性选择机制可能主导经典线性边际稳定性准则
AI.significance: 为反应扩散方程的传播动力学提供了新的分析框架，将经典变分原理与最优控制理论结合，扩展了波速估计的理论工具

title: Limiting behavior of principal eigenvalues for a class of mixed boundary value problems as the measure of the support domain goes to zero
summary:
In this paper we characterize the limiting behavior of the principal eigenvalue, $\s_1[-\D,\b,Ø]$, of the boundary value problem \eqref{1.1} as the Lebesgue measure of the underlying domain, $Ø$, tends to zero. Naturally, the domains $Ø$ are assumed to be included on a fixed open set $D$ such that $\b\in\mc{C}(D)$, and they satisfy $\barØ\subset D$. Our main result establishes that, in the classical case when $\inf_{D}\b >0$, $$
  \lim_{|Ø|\da 0}\s_1[-\D,\b,Ø] =+\infty, $$ whereas $$
  \lim_{|Ø|\da 0}\s_1[-\D,\b,Ø] =-\infty\;\;\hbox{if}\;\; \sup_{D}\b <0, $$ which is a surprising result at the light of the classical existing theorems for Dirichlet boundary conditions. Furthermore, in the special case when $\b>0$ is a constant, we can prove that $$
  \lim_{R\da 0}\left( R \s_1[-\D,\b,B_R]\right)=\b \frac{\mathrm{Area}(\p B_1)}{|B_1|}, $$ where, we are denoting $B_\varrho:=\{x\in\R^N\;:\;|x|<\varrho\}$ for all $\varrho>0$.

AI.tldr: 研究了当区域测度趋于零时，带Robin边界条件的Laplace算子主特征值的极限行为
AI.motivation: 研究Robin边界条件下Laplace算子主特征值在区域测度趋于零时的渐近行为，与Dirichlet边界条件的经典结果形成对比
AI.techniques: 特征值理论、渐近分析、球对称区域上的精确计算、区域测度趋于零的极限过程
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当β>0时，主特征值趋于+∞；当β<0时，主特征值趋于-∞；2. 在球对称区域和常数β>0情况下，给出了精确的渐近公式
AI.significance: 揭示了Robin边界条件下特征值行为的特殊性，为小区域上的谱分析提供了理论基础，对椭圆算子的谱理论有重要贡献

title: Quantitative Stability for Minkowski's problem
summary:
We derive quantitative stability results for Minkowski bodies, as well as their counterparts, the $L_p$-Minkowski bodies in the range $1 \le p \neq n$. We prove that, for every pair of probability measures $μ,ν$ satisfying a quantitative form of the classical dispersion assumptions yielding existence of such bodies, we have a control of the form \[
  α(E_μ, E_ν)^2 \le C \mathrm{d}_{\mathrm{C}}(μ,ν)^{1 + \frac{1}{n}}, \] where $α$ denotes the Fraenkel asymmetry and $\mathrm{d}_{\mathrm{C}}$ is the dual-convex distance of probability measures on the sphere. Our arguments are based on a variational problem whose optimizers are Minkowski bodies, for which we can obtain strong-concavity properties with the quantitative Brunn-Minkowski and isoperimetric inequalities.

AI.tldr: 建立了Minkowski体和L_p-Minkowski体在1≤p≠n范围内的定量稳定性结果
AI.motivation: 研究Minkowski体和L_p-Minkowski体的稳定性问题，这些几何体在凸几何和等周不等式理论中具有基础重要性。经典的存在性结果需要验证分散性假设，本文旨在建立这些几何体在概率测度扰动下的定量稳定性控制。
AI.techniques: 基于变分问题方法，其优化解就是Minkowski体；利用定量Brunn-Minkowski不等式和等周不等式获得强凹性性质；使用对偶凸距离和Fraenkel不对称性作为度量工具。
AI.main_theorems: 对于满足定量分散性假设的概率测度对μ,ν，证明了控制不等式α(E_μ, E_ν)^2 ≤ C d_C(μ,ν)^{1 + 1/n}，其中α是Fraenkel不对称性，d_C是球面上概率测度的对偶凸距离。
AI.significance: 为凸几何中的Minkowski问题提供了定量稳定性理论，将经典存在性结果推广到稳定性分析；建立了测度扰动与几何体形状变化之间的精确定量关系；在最优运输、凸几何和等周不等式理论中有重要应用。

title: Global Uniqueness of Subsonic Flows for the Steady Euler-Poisson System
summary: We prove the global uniqueness of subsonic solutions to the steady Euler-Poisson system in a bounded domain. Previous works established the existence and local uniqueness of multidimensional subsonic flows by constructing solutions as small perturbations of one-dimensional background states, where a contraction mapping argument applies in a small perturbation regime. In contrast, the present paper removes the smallness assumption and proves global uniqueness within a class of subsonic solutions satisfying the same boundary data.

AI.tldr: 证明了有界区域中稳态Euler-Poisson系统亚音速解的全局唯一性
AI.motivation: 先前研究通过将多维亚音速流构造为一维背景状态的小扰动，建立了存在性和局部唯一性，但需要小扰动假设。本文旨在移除这一小性假设，证明满足相同边界条件的亚音速解类的全局唯一性。
AI.techniques: 移除了小扰动假设，可能在亚音速解类中发展了全局分析方法，而不是依赖局部收缩映射论证
AI.main_theorems: 证明了有界区域中稳态Euler-Poisson系统亚音速解的全局唯一性，即在满足相同边界条件的亚音速解类中，解是唯一的
AI.significance: 这是对Euler-Poisson系统理论的重要推进，将唯一性结果从小扰动局部情形扩展到全局情形，为等离子体物理、半导体器件模拟等应用中亚音速流的数学分析提供了更坚实的理论基础

title: Rigorous derivation of an effective model for periodic Schrödinger equations with linear band crossing of Dirac type
summary: In this paper we consider a family of time-dependent 1-dimensional cubic Schrödinger equation (NLS) with periodic potential. Exploiting semiclassical scaling and multiscale analysis, we derive an effective nonlinear Dirac equation, which describes the dynamics of solutions to NLS spectrally localized around Dirac points.

AI.tldr: 通过半经典尺度和多尺度分析，将一维含周期势的立方薛定谔方程约化为描述狄拉克点附近解动力学的有效非线性狄拉克方程。
AI.motivation: 研究含周期势的一维时间依赖立方薛定谔方程，特别是解在狄拉克点附近的谱局域化行为，旨在理解非线性波在周期介质中的有效动力学。
AI.techniques: 半经典尺度分析、多尺度展开方法、有效介质理论、非线性狄拉克方程的推导技术。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了含周期势的立方薛定谔方程在狄拉克点附近谱局域化的解，其动力学可由一个有效非线性狄拉克方程精确描述。
AI.significance: 为理解非线性波在周期结构中的传播提供了新的理论框架，连接了薛定谔方程和狄拉克方程理论，在凝聚态物理和光学中有潜在应用。

title: A heterogeneous nonlocal advection--diffusion system
summary: We present a self-contained investigation on the local and global well-posedness for a system of nonlocal advection--diffusion equations for a heterogeneous population over $\mathbb{R}^d$, $d \in \mathbb{N}$. Each convolution kernel $K_{ij}$, which describes the nonlocal advection of species $i$ according to the distribution of species $j$, is assumed to have its own regularity $\nabla K_{ij} \in L^{q_{ij}}(\mathbb{R}^d),\, 1 < q_{ij} < \infty$. Local well-posedness of the mild solution and its regularity is obtained using semigroup theory and contraction mapping arguments. For families of kernels classified as regular, a global bound is established using a Nash-type inequality. For suitable irregular families of kernels, global boundedness is instead obtained via a smallness condition on the initial data. A one-dimensional numerical example is provided to illustrate the influence of kernel regularity on the solutions.

AI.tldr: 研究非局部对流-扩散方程系统在异质种群中的局部和全局适定性，特别关注卷积核正则性对解行为的影响
AI.motivation: 研究$\mathbb{R}^d$上异质种群的非局部对流-扩散方程系统，其中每个卷积核$K_{ij}$描述物种$i$根据物种$j$分布的非局部对流，核具有各自的正则性$\nabla K_{ij} \in L^{q_{ij}}(\mathbb{R}^d)$，旨在理解核正则性对解存在性和行为的影响
AI.techniques: 使用半群理论和压缩映射论证获得局部适定性；对正则核族使用Nash型不等式建立全局有界性；对不规则核族通过初始数据的小性条件获得全局有界性；提供一维数值示例
AI.main_theorems: 1. 获得温和解的局部适定性及其正则性；2. 对正则核族建立全局有界性；3. 对不规则核族在初始数据小性条件下获得全局有界性；4. 数值展示核正则性对解的影响
AI.significance: 为非局部种群模型提供了系统的适定性理论，揭示了核正则性在决定解行为中的关键作用，对生态学、生物学中的空间显式模型有重要应用价值

title: On single-frequency asymptotics for the Maxwell-Bloch equations: pure states
summary: We consider damped driven Maxwell-Bloch equations for a single-mode Maxwell field coupled to a two-level molecule. The equations are used for semiclassical description of the laser action. Our main result is the construction of solutions with single-frequency asymptotics of the Maxwell field in the case of quasiperiodic pumping. The asymptotics hold for solutions with harmonic initial values which are stationary states of averaged reduced equations in the interaction picture. We calculate all harmonic states and analyse their stability. Our calculations rely on the Hopf reduction by the gauge symmetry group U(1). The asymptotics follow by application of the averaging theory of Bogolyubov--Eckhaus--Sanchez-Palencia.

AI.tldr: 构造了在准周期泵浦下单模Maxwell场具有单频渐近行为的解
AI.motivation: 研究激光作用的半经典描述，特别是准周期泵浦下Maxwell-Bloch方程的动力学行为
AI.techniques: Hopf约化（通过规范对称群U(1)）、Bogolyubov-Eckhaus-Sanchez-Palencia平均理论、稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 构造了具有单频渐近行为的解，计算了所有调和态并分析了其稳定性
AI.significance: 为激光物理中的准周期泵浦系统提供了严格的数学框架，揭示了渐近行为的机制

title: Some Preliminary Considerations on Energy Behavior in Fluid Dynamics
summary: This work presents a tentative discussion of certain aspects of energy behavior in the context of mathematical fluid dynamics. While some observations are made regarding certain patterns in energy behavior under particular conditions, the broader implications of these findings remain uncertain and should be interpreted with considerable caution. The results are preliminary in nature, and their relevance to analytic properties of solutions is demanding clarification at this stage. These considerations are intended to motivate further inquiry rather than to establish any definitive conclusions. Readers should approach the material presented here as exploratory, with significant open questions left unresolved.

AI.tldr: 对流体动力学中能量行为某些方面的初步探索性讨论，强调结果的初步性和不确定性
AI.motivation: 探索数学流体动力学中能量行为的某些方面，旨在激发进一步研究而非建立确定结论
AI.techniques: 未明确说明具体技术，但强调是初步观察和探索性分析
AI.main_theorems: 未提出明确定理，仅报告特定条件下能量行为的初步观察，结果具有不确定性
AI.significance: 作为探索性研究，主要意义在于提出问题和激发进一步研究，而非提供确定结论
